title: IsRigidConstraint
description: IsRigidConstraint: A fragment to identify whether the RigidLink is a Constraint or Link (i.e. element) in GSA.

RigidConstraint.description: True means the RigidLink will be treated as a Rigid Constraint in GSA, false means it will be treated as a Link.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
